a.xlink:title: Retrieve a generic card back pixmap.
Retrieve a card pixmap, either from cache or enqueued for loading.
Enqueues an ExactCard for loading.
Access the singleton instance of CardPictureLoader.
Convenience helper to get the card's display name.
Generates a stable cache key for pixmap caching.
Emitted when an image load is enqueued.
Adds a queued image download to the log and increments the progress bar maximum.
Marks an image as successfully loaded. Updates the progress bar and marks the corresponding log entry...
Slot called by the worker when an image is loaded. Inserts the pixmap into the cache and emits pixmap...
Emitted when an image has finished loading.
Emitted when a request is added to the network queue.
Emitted when a network request successfully completes.
Triggered when the user changes the picture download settings. Clears the QPixmap cache to reload ima...
Triggered when the pictures path changes. Clears the QPixmap cache to reload images.
Emits the pixmapUpdated signal on the underlying CardInfo.
Returns the underlying CardInfoPtr.
Returns a reference to the underlying CardInfo object.
Creates a new instance with only the card name.
Returns a version of the card name safe for file storage or fuzzy matching.
Returns the printing information associated with this card.
Retrieves the value of a specific property.
Returns the set this printing belongs to.
Returns the providerID for this printing.
